metadata.title: Mai Canza JPG/PNG zuwa WebP Kyauta – Ba Iyaka, Ba Đorawa
metadata.description: Rage girman hoto har zuwa 35% ba tare da asarar inganci ba. Ana yin canza JPG da PNG zuwa WebP a cikin na'urar ka – fayiloli ba sa barin na'urar ka. Ba buƙatar rajista, ba iyaka.

hero.title: Mai Canza JPG/PNG zuwa WebP – Kyauta, Ba Iyaka
hero.description: Rage girman fayil na hoto har zuwa 35% ba tare da asarar inganci ba. Ƙara fayiloli, zaɓi matakin inganci, kuma sauke hotuna a cikin tsarin WebP. Ana yin dukan canzawa a cikin browser na gida.

software.name: Mai canza JPG da PNG zuwa WebP ta yanar gizo - kyauta, ba iyaka
alternateName: Mai canza JPG zuwa WebP da PNG zuwa WebP
software.description: Mai canza JPG da PNG zuwa WebP kyauta ta yanar gizo. Rage girman fayil na hoto har zuwa 35%, inganta saurin lodi na shafi da ƙimar Core Web Vitals. Ana yin canzawa a cikin browser - ba a aika fayiloli zuwa sabar ba.
featureList: Canza fayiloli da yawa a lokaci guda
Duban girma kafin da bayan canzawa
Sauke dukan fayiloli a matsayin ZIP
Sarrafa a cikin browser na gida (ba a aika fayiloli zuwa sabar ba)

howTo.name: Yadda ake canza JPG da PNG zuwa WebP ta yanar gizo
howTo.description: Yadda ake canza hotunan JPG da PNG zuwa tsarin WebP. Saitin inganci (60–95%), tsarin Smart Quality, da sauke fayiloli da aka canza a matsayin ZIP.

steps.name: Ƙara fayiloli don canzawa
steps.text: Ja hotunan JPG ko PNG zuwa wurin da aka kebantar ko zaɓi fayiloli daga na'urar ka. Za ka iya ƙara fayiloli da yawa a lokaci guda.

steps.name: Saita matakin inganci
steps.text: Zaɓi ingancin fayil na WebP ta amfani da mai zamewa (60–95%). Ƙimar asali na 80% kyakkyawan daidaito ne tsakanin inganci da girma.

steps.name: Fara canzawa
steps.text: Bayan fara canzawa, kayan aikin zai sarrafa dukan fayiloli a cikin jerin kuma ya yi amfani da Smart Quality ta atomatik.

steps.name: Sauke fayiloli da aka canza
steps.text: Ana iya sauke fayiloli da aka canza ɗaya-ɗaya ko duka a lokaci guda a matsayin ma'ajiyar ZIP.

contentBlocks.title: Menene WebP kuma me ya sa ake canza hotuna?
contentBlocks.html:
WebP tsarin hoto ne da Google ya ƙirƙira wanda ke ba da damar rage girman fayilolin hoto har zuwa 25–35% idan aka kwatanta da JPG da PNG - yayin kiyaye ingancin gani mai kama. Ƙananan fayiloli suna nufin saurin lodi na shafi, wanda ke fassarawa zuwa ingantaccen gogayya na mai amfani da ƙarin maki a cikin PageSpeed Insights.

Dukan browsers na zamani suna tallafawa tsarin WebP: Chrome, Firefox, Safari (daga sigar 14), da Edge. Idan kana gudanar da gidan yanar gizo, shagon kan layi, ko blog, canza hotuna zuwa WebP ɗaya ne daga cikin hanyoyin mafi sauƙi don inganta aikin shafi.

Mai canza yana tallafawa hotunan JPG da zane-zanen PNG (ciki har da waɗanda ke da gaskiya). Za ka iya canza fayiloli kowace iri a lokaci guda - ana sarrafa duka a cikin browser na gida, ba tare da aika zuwa sabar ba.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake canza hotuna zuwa WebP
contentBlocks.description: Canza zuwa WebP yana ɗaukar 'yan daƙiƙu kaɗan kawai:

items.title: 1. Ƙara fayiloli
items.description: Ja hotunan JPG ko PNG zuwa wurin da aka kebantar ko zaɓi fayiloli daga na'urar ka. Za ka iya ƙara fayiloli ko kowace iri a lokaci guda.

items.title: 2. Saita inganci
items.description: Zaɓi matakin inganci (asali 80%). Ƙaramin ƙima yana nufin ƙaramin fayil. Don yawancin amfani, 80% shine saitin da ya fi dacewa.

items.title: 3. Sauke WebP
items.description: Bayan canzawa, sauke fayiloli ɗaya-ɗaya ko a matsayin ma'ajiyar ZIP. Kowane fayil yana nuna bayanin sararin da aka ajiye.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake ƙara fayiloli don canzawa
contentBlocks.html:
Kayan aikin yana ba da hanyoyi biyu don ƙara fayiloli:

  • Ja da sauke - ɗauki fayiloli daga babban fayil a kan kwamfutar ka kuma ka jefa su a kan yankin da aka lakafta "Ja kuma sauke hotuna a nan". Za ka iya jan fayiloli da yawa a lokaci guda.
  • Zaɓi daga na'ura - danna wurin ɗora fayil yana buɗe tattaunawar zaɓi. Riƙe Ctrl (ko Cmd akan Mac) yana ba ka damar zaɓar fayiloli da yawa a lokaci guda.

Kayan aikin yana karɓar fayilolin JPG da PNG kawai. Idan ka ƙara fayil a cikin wani tsari ba da gangan ba (misali, GIF ko BMP), za a tsallake shi ta atomatik kuma za ka ga saƙon bayani.

Sirri: Ana sarrafa dukan fayiloli a cikin browser na gida. Ba a aika su ko'ina ba - ba sa zuwa kowane sabar. Bayan rufe shafin ko browser, ana cire fayiloli daga ƙwaƙwalwa.

contentBlocks.title: Menene ma'anar matsayin fayiloli?
contentBlocks.html:
Kowane fayil a cikin jerin yana da ɗaya daga cikin matsayi huɗu da ke nuna ci gaban canzawa:

Ana jira

Fayil yana cikin jerin kuma yana jiran a sarrafa shi. Canzawa bai fara ba tukuna.

Ana sarrafa…

Ana canza fayil. Don yawancin hotuna wannan yana ɗaukar ɓangaren daƙiƙa, amma manyan fayiloli sosai na iya ɗaukar daƙiƙu da yawa.

An gama

An kammala canzawa cikin nasara. Fayil na WebP yana shirye don saukewa. Kusa da matsayin za ka kuma ga girma kafin da bayan canzawa.

Kuskure

Wani abu ya yi kuskure yayin canzawa. Wannan na iya zama fayil na tushe da ya lalace ko matsalar ƙwaƙwalwar browser tare da manyan hotuna sosai. Maɓallin "Sake gwadawa" yana ba ka damar sake gwadawa.

contentBlocks.title: Yaya Smart Quality ke aiki?
contentBlocks.html:
Smart Quality tsari ne na inganta ta atomatik da ke tabbatar da fayil na WebP da aka samar ba zai taɓa zama mafi girma daga na asali ba. Yana aiki kamar haka:

  1. Kayan aikin yana canza hoton a ingancin da ka saita (misali, 80%).
  2. Yana duba ko fayil da ya samo ya fi ƙanƙanta daga na asali.
  3. Idan ya fi girma, yana rage inganci ta atomatik kuma ya sake gwadawa.
  4. Tsarin yana maimaita har sai fayil da aka samar ya fi ƙanƙanta ko inganci ya faɗi ƙasa da mafi ƙarancin aminci.

Kayan aikin yana zaɓar saitin da suka fi dacewa ta atomatik. Idan kana da hoton da aka riga aka matse sosai (misali, JPG a ingancin 60%), za a daidaita sigogin ta atomatik don ci gaba da samun rage girma.

Kusa da kowane fayil za ka ga "Ingancin WebP da aka yi amfani da shi" - wannan shine ingancin gaske da aka yi amfani da shi bayan duk wani daidaitawar Smart Quality.

contentBlocks.title: Saitin inganci - menene za a zaɓa?
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Saita inganci

80%
Babban ƙima = inganci mafi kyau, fayil mafi girma
Sauke ta atomatik bayan canzawa
Sauke ɗaya-ɗayaSauke a matsayin ZIP
contentBlocks.html:
Mai zamewan inganci yana ba ka damar saita ƙima daga 60% zuwa 95%. Babban ƙima yana nufin ingancin hoto mafi kyau amma kuma girman fayil mafi girma.

  • 80% (asali) - kyakkyawan daidaito don yawancin amfani.
  • 85–90% - don hotunan kayan da portfolios na daukar hoto.
  • 60–70% - lokacin da rage girman fayil shine fifiko.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake sauke fayiloli da aka canza
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
CanzaSauke dukaSauke a matsayin ZIP
Haɗa rahoton CSV a cikin ZIP

Girman shigarwa: 2.4 MB

Girma bayan canzawa: 890 KB

An ajiye: 1.5 MB (~63%)
contentBlocks.html:
Bayan an kammala canzawa, kana da zaɓuɓɓukan saukewa da yawa:

  • Sauke (kusa da kowane fayil) - yana sauke fayil guda ɗaya na WebP.
  • Sauke duka - yana sauke dukan fayiloli ɗaya bayan ɗaya.
  • Sauke a matsayin ZIP - yana ƙirƙirar ma'ajiya tare da dukan fayiloli.

Zaɓin rahoton CSV: Haɗa rahoton taƙaitaccen canzawa a cikin ma'ajiyar ZIP.

contentBlocks.title: Rahoton ajiya - menene ke nunawa?
contentBlocks.html:
Ƙasan maɓallan canzawa za ka sami taƙaitaccen bayani tare da bayanan ajiya:

  • Jimlar girman shigarwa - jimlar girman dukan fayilolin asali.
  • Jimlar girma bayan canzawa - jimlar girman dukan fayilolin WebP.
  • An ajiye - nawa sarari ka samu ta hanyar canzawa (a cikin KB/MB da kashi).

Kwafa taƙaitaccen bayani: Maɓallin yana kwafa rahoton zuwa clipboard a cikin tsarin rubutu. Za ka iya liƙa shi a cikin bayanan kula, imel, ko takardu - yana da amfani don rubuta inganta hoto.

contentBlocks.title: Nawa za ka iya ajiyewa ta hanyar canza zuwa WebP?
contentBlocks.html:
Ajiya ya dogara da nau'in hoto da matakin matsar sa na asali. A ƙasa akwai sakamakon misali don fayiloli na yau da kullum:

Hoton JPG (kyamara)

2.4 MB → 890 KB

Ajiya: ~63%

Zanen PNG (alama)

180 KB → 45 KB

Ajiya: ~75%

Hoton kayan

500 KB → 185 KB

Ajiya: ~63%

Ajiyar gaske na iya bambanta. Mai canza yana nuna daidaitaccen girma kafin da bayan canzawa don kowane fayil, da kuma taƙaitaccen jimlar ajiya.

contentBlocks.title: Menene ke sa mai canza JPG/PNG zuwa WebP ya bambanta?

items.title: Cikakken sirri
items.description: Fayiloli ba sa barin kwamfutar ka. Ana yin canzawa a cikin browser - ba a aika komai zuwa sabar ba. Bayan rufe shafin, ana cire bayanai.

items.title: Canza fayiloli da yawa a lokaci guda
items.description: Canza hotuna ko kowace iri a lokaci guda. Ana sarrafa dukan fayiloli biye da biye, kuma sakamakon suna samuwa don saukewa ɗaya-ɗaya ko a matsayin ma'ajiyar ZIP.

items.title: Smart Quality
items.description: Kayan aikin yana daidaita inganci ta atomatik domin fayil da aka samar ya kasance koyaushe ya fi ƙanƙanta daga na asali. Ba buƙatar neman saitin da suka fi dacewa da hannu.

items.title: Sauke a matsayin ZIP
items.description: Sauke fayiloli da aka canza ɗaya-ɗaya ko duka a lokaci guda a matsayin ma'ajiyar ZIP. A zaɓi, za ka iya haɗa rahoton CSV tare da taƙaitaccen bayani.

contentBlocks.title: Abubuwan da ya kamata a tuna
contentBlocks.description: Shawarwari kaɗan don taimakawa wajen guje wa matsaloli yayin canzawa:

items.title: Manyan fayiloli sosai
items.description: Canza hotuna sama da 4000×4000 pixels na iya zama a hankali kuma ya matsa browser. Idan kana sarrafa manyan fayiloli da yawa, yi la'akari da raba su zuwa kungiyoyi.

items.title: Hotuna da aka riga aka matse
items.description: Idan an ajiye JPG na asali a inganci mai ƙaranci sosai, canza zuwa WebP ba zai iya ba da babban ajiya ba. A cikin yanayi masu tsanani, fayil na WebP na iya ma zama mafi girma - Smart Quality za ta rage inganci ta atomatik.

items.title: Tsarin PNG mai gaskiya
items.description: WebP yana tallafawa gaskiya, don haka fayilolin PNG masu tashar alpha za a canza su daidai. Duk da haka, ajiyar girma don PNGs masu gaskiya na iya zama ƙasa da na hotunan JPG na yau da kullum.

items.title: Dacewa da browser
items.description: Dukan browsers na zamani (Chrome, Firefox, Safari 14+, Edge) suna tallafawa WebP. Idan dole ne shafin ya yi aiki a kan tsoffin browsers, za ka iya amfani da alamar <picture> tare da tushen JPG/PNG na madadin.

contentBlocks.title: Yaushe ne ya cancanta a canza hotuna zuwa WebP?
contentBlocks.description: Canza zuwa WebP yana kawo fa'ida a kusan kowane hali lokacin da ake nuna hotuna a cikin browser:

items.title: Gidajen yanar gizo na kasuwanci
items.description: Saurin lodi yana inganta ra'ayi na farko kuma yana rage yawan ficewa.

items.title: Shaguna ta yanar gizo
items.description: Hotunan kayan yawanci sune manyan fayiloli a kan shafi; inganta su yana hanzarta dukan shagon.

items.title: Blogogi da kofofi
items.description: Labarai masu hotuna da yawa suna lodi da sauri sosai.

items.title: Portfolios na daukar hoto
items.description: A ingancin 85–90%, bambancin gani ba a gane shi ba, kuma fayiloli sun fi ƙanƙanta.

items.title: Aikace-aikacen yanar gizo (PWA)
items.description: Ƙananan kayan suna nufin saurin aiki, musamman a kan na'urorin hannu.

contentBlocks.title: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da mai canza WebP

items.question: Menene WebP kuma yaya ya bambanta da JPG?
items.answer: WebP tsarin hoto ne da Google ya ƙirƙira wanda ke haɗa fa'idodin JPG (ƙananan fayilolin hoto) da PNG (gaskiya). Fayilolin WebP a matsakaita sun fi ƙanƙanta da 25–35% fiye da JPG a ingancin gani mai kama. Dukan browsers na zamani (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) suna tallafawa WebP.
items.answerSchemaText: WebP tsarin hoton Google ne, ya fi ƙanƙanta da 25–35% fiye da JPG. Dukan browsers na zamani suna tallafawa shi.

items.question: Shin WebP yana tallafawa gaskiya kamar PNG?
items.answer: Eh. WebP yana tallafawa tashar alpha (gaskiya) - fayilolin PNG masu bayan gaskiya za a canza su daidai. Duk da haka, ajiyar girma don PNGs masu gaskiya na iya zama ƙasa da na hotunan JPG na yau da kullum.
items.answerSchemaText: Eh, WebP yana tallafawa gaskiyar alpha. Fayilolin PNG masu bayan gaskiya suna canzawa daidai.

items.question: Wane matakin inganci ya kamata in zaɓa?
items.answer: Don yawancin amfani (gidajen yanar gizo, shaguna, blogogi), ingancin 80% yana ba da kyakkyawan daidaito tsakanin girman fayil da bayyanar. Don hotunan kayan ko portfolios, za ka iya zaɓar 85–90%. Ƙimomi ƙasa da 70% za su rage girma sosai amma na iya gabatar da aibobi masu ganuwa.
items.answerSchemaText: 80% don yawancin amfani. 85–90% don hotunan kayan. Ƙasa da 70% don mafi girman matsa.

items.question: Nawa sarari zan iya ajiyewa?
items.answer: Ajiya na yau da kullum shine 25–35% idan aka kwatanta da JPG. Misali, hoton JPG na 500 KB bayan canzawa zuwa WebP zai kasance kusan 325–375 KB. Don PNG, ajiya na iya zama mafi girma - har zuwa 50–70%.
items.answerSchemaText: 25–35% don JPG, har zuwa 50–70% don PNG.

items.question: Zan iya canza fayiloli da yawa a lokaci guda?
items.answer: Eh. Za ka iya ƙara fayiloli ko kowace iri a lokaci guda - babu iyaka. Za a canza duka, kuma za ka iya sauke su ɗaya-ɗaya ko a matsayin ma'ajiyar ZIP.
items.answerSchemaText: Eh, canza fayiloli da yawa ba tare da iyaka ba tare da sauke ZIP.

items.question: Menene Smart Quality?
items.answer: Smart Quality tsari ne na daidaita inganci ta atomatik da ke tabbatar da fayil na WebP da aka samar ba zai taɓa zama mafi girma daga na asali ba. Idan canzawa zai haifar da babban fayil (wanda zai iya faruwa tare da hotuna da aka riga aka matse sosai), kayan aikin yana rage inganci ta atomatik har sai abin da aka samar ya fi ƙanƙanta.
items.answerSchemaText: Daidaita inganci ta atomatik da ke tabbatar da fayil da aka samar koyaushe ya fi ƙanƙanta daga na asali.

items.question: Shin WebP yana hanzarta gidan yanar gizo?
items.answer: Eh. Ƙananan fayilolin hoto suna nufin saurin lodi na shafi. Wannan yana shafar ma'aunin LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) a cikin Core Web Vitals kai tsaye - ɗaya daga cikin abubuwan tantance matsayi na Google. Kayan aiki kamar PageSpeed Insights yawanci suna ba da shawarar canza hotuna zuwa WebP.
items.answerSchemaText: Eh, ƙananan fayiloli suna inganta LCP da ƙimar Core Web Vitals.
